name.description: A name of a microservice to deploy with. This name will be used as name of the microservice deployment and in labels.

image.description:
A Docker image to deploy the stackdriver-exporter
Default: docker.io/prometheuscommunity/stackdriver-exporter:v0.18.0

imagePullPolicy.description: Image pull policy to use for stackdriver-exporter deployment

resources.description: The resources describes the compute resource requests and limits for single Pod.

requests.description: The requests describes the minimum amount of compute resources required.

cpu.description: The minimum amount of CPU required. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/#meaning-of-cpu

memory.description: The minimum amount of memory required. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/#meaning-of-memory

limits.description: The limits describes the maximum amount of compute resources allowed.

cpu.description: The maximum amount of CPU that stackdriver-exporter container can use. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/#meaning-of-cpu

memory.description: The maximum amount of memory that stackdriver-exporter container can use. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/#meaning-of-memory

runAsUser.description: The UID to run the stackdriver-exporter container as.

runAsGroup.description: The GID to run the stackdriver-exporter container as.

fsGroup.description: A special supplemental group that applies to all containers in a pod.

port.description: Port of stackdriver-exporter which use in service

annotations.description: Annotations set which will be created in service

projectId.description: The Google Project ID to gather metrics for

serviceAccountSecret.description: An existing secret which contains credentials.json

serviceAccountSecretKey.description: Provide custom key for the existing secret to load credentials.json from

serviceAccountKey.description: A service account key JSON file. Must be provided when no existing secret is used, in this case a new secret will be created holding this service account

maxRetries.description: Max number of retries that should be attempted on 503 errors from Stackdriver

httpTimeout.description: How long should Stackdriver_exporter wait for a result from the Stackdriver API

maxBackoff.description: Max time between each request in an exp backoff scenario

backoffJitter.description: The amount of jitter to introduce in an exp backoff scenario

retryStatuses.description: The HTTP statuses that should trigger a retry

dropDelegatedProjects.description: Drop metrics from attached projects and fetch `project_id` only

typePrefixes.description: The prefixes to gather metrics for, we default to just CPU metrics.

offset.description: How far into the past to offset

ingestDelay.description: Offset for the Google Stackdriver Monitoring Metrics interval into the past by the ingest delay from the metric's metadata.

affinity.description: If specified, the pod's scheduling constraints

nodeSelector.description: Allow define which Nodes the Pods are scheduled on.

tolerations.description: Tolerations allow the pods to schedule onto nodes with matching taints.

create.description: Specifies whether a ServiceAccount should be created.

name.description: The name of the ServiceAccount to use.

annotations.description: Will add the provided map to the annotations for the created serviceAccount.

labels.description: Will add the provided map to the labels for the created serviceAccount.

install.description: When set true then use a ServiceMonitor to configure scraping

interval.description: Set how frequently Prometheus should scrape

labels.description: Set labels for the ServiceMonitor, use this to define your scrape label for Prometheus Operator

relabelings.description: Set relabelings for the ServiceMonitor, use to apply to samples before scraping

metricRelabelings.description: Set metricRelabelings for the ServiceMonitor, use to apply to samples for ingestion

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata. They are not queryable and should be preserved when modifying objects.

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services.

priorityClassName.description: PriorityClassName assigned to the Pods to prevent them from evicting.
